description: Milestone 7: Knowledge & Orientation Hub. Curated, role-based learning and 'what can I do now?' guidance to activate semi-active members, with privacy-preserving personalization.

userStories.title: Add Knowledge tab with static content architecture
userStories.description: Create a maintainable structure for knowledge articles (bundled markdown/json) and render them in-app.
acceptanceCriteria: Knowledge tab lists article categories and articles
Articles are stored locally in the app bundle (no network)
Renderer supports headings, lists, links (basic markdown subset is fine)
Context7 consulted for iOS markdown rendering approaches or lightweight alternatives; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Add 'Start here' orientation flow
userStories.description: Provide a gentle onboarding flow that suggests actions without pressure.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Start here' screen suggests 3–5 actions (read forum, reply to message, claim a todo, create a todo, update profile)
User can dismiss; no nagging; no dark patterns
Context7 consulted for onboarding UX best practices in SwiftUI; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Role-based article shortcuts (minimal, privacy-preserving)
userStories.description: Allow users to optionally select interests/roles to show relevant knowledge shortcuts.
acceptanceCriteria: Profile/Settings includes optional role selection (e.g., Kreisverband, Schatzmeister, Anträge, Kommunalpolitik)
Selection stored locally only (no server sync yet)
Knowledge tab shows shortcuts based on selection
Context7 consulted for local settings storage best practices; summary added to progress.txt
